arts.ttl: What is AC Milan’s biggest win of all time?
arts.sum: To date, AC Milan’s biggest ever win in Serie A was the 9-0 home victory over Palermo. AC Milan’s biggest ever away win in the club’s history came in 1955, when the club beat Genoa 8-0 in Serie A on 5 June, 1955.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Slovan Bratislava v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: AC Milan are set to face Slovan Bratislava in a crucial UEFA Champions League match on Tuesday at the Štadión Tehelné pole. This match marks a significant point in the group stage as Milan aims to secure their position for the next phase of the competition. Under the guidance of coach Paulo Fonseca, the Rossonoeri will be making strategic changes to their lineup. Noah Okafor will replace Rafael Leao on the left wing, while Christian Pulisic and Samuel Chukwueze will support Tammy Abraham, who steps in for the suspended Alvaro Morata as the central striker.
